hero.description: Founder-led studio since 2018 — websites, data scraping, and custom software for business owners who want someone accountable, not a faceless agency.
hero.services: Website Redesign | Mobile-First | Speed & SEO | WhatsApp Integration
hero.philosophy: I'd rather take a week longer and ship something solid than rush something you'll need fixed in a month.

transformations.story: Their 2015 template looked outdated on phones. We rebuilt it with clear booking buttons and a modern, trustworthy design.
Slow, cluttered homepage → clean menu, hours, and click-to-call. Customers started calling from mobile within the first week.
Generic template → professional look that matches their reputation. Clear practice areas and a simple contact form.

team.name: Shubham Sunny
team.bio: I started freelancing on Fiverr in 2018 and built this into a small studio over eight years. I still review architecture and code on every project — websites, scrapers, and custom apps for clients who need someone reliable.
team.philosophy: A website should make a stranger feel confident enough to call you.

team.name: Deep Shikha
team.bio: Deep has been with us for years handling QA on real devices, client kickoff calls, milestone tracking, and making sure nothing goes live until it passes her checklist.
team.philosophy: Quality is not a phase — it is the reason clients come back.

team.name: Shushma Devi
team.bio: Shushma runs hiring, team culture, and client outreach — the reason we can keep the same trusted people on projects instead of rotating strangers.
team.philosophy: Great delivery starts with great people — and great people need clear direction.

team.name: Vinay Thakur
team.bio: Vinay manages timelines and delivery on larger builds — weekly check-ins, milestone tracking, and keeping complex projects moving without surprises.
team.philosophy: Ship on time, communicate early, and never hide bad news.
